mapper.select: SELECT coupon_id, name, price FROM coupons
SELECT total_point FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_purchase (price, name, state, created_date, student_id, coupon_id) VALUES(#{couponPrice}, #{couponName}, #{state}, NOW(), (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}), #{couponId})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point - #{couponPrice}, total_coupon = total_coupon + 1 WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND total_point >= #{couponPrice}
mapper.select: SELECT cp.name, cp.price, cp.state, cp.created_date as createdDate FROM coupon_purchase cp INNER JOIN coupons c ON cp.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE cp.student_id = (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId})
SELECT COUNT(coupon_id) FROM coupon_purchase WHERE student_id = (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId})
